encoding_before: n bits interpreted as vertices (incorrect for graph property).
encoding_after: n = k(k-1)/2 bits interpreted as edges of a k-vertex graph.
mathematical_note: The prior flat table was an encoding artifact. Independent set is now computed as a graph property over edge variables; observed degrees are reported at edge counts n in {3,6,10,15}, corresponding to k in {3,4,5,6} vertices.
